content_lint.name: no_template_field_brackets
content_lint.forbid: \[(Action name|Process Name|Input|Format|Step #|The question|Person / agent|Frequency|Unknown, and who could answer it|Who runs it today|Quick / Deep|Steps)\]

content_lint.name: no_unfilled_deep_sections
content_lint.forbid: \[(How long a run takes|What a bad run costs|How corrections and overrides)

content_lint.name: no_interview_narration
content_lint.forbid: (the interview (did|didn'?t|never|covered|ended)|person interviewed|(this |the )session (ran|ended|didn'?t)|(not |never )asked (before|during|yet)|asked,? not (yet )?answered|ran out of turns|not (covered|reached) (in|this|before) (this )?session|interview area|out of turns|the operator (first|initially) (said|stated|described|mentioned)|then (described|said) (this|it))
